name: Taux de Capitalisation
description: Calculez le taux de capitalisation d'un bien immobilier d'investissement.
seo_title: Taux de Capitalisation – Étape par Étape
seo_description: Calculez le taux de capitalisation d'un bien immobilier d'investissement. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Calculatrice facile a utiliser avec.
example_label: Calculating cap rate for commercial property with $42,000 NOI valued at $525,000.
result_context: The cap_rate of {cap_rate}% indicates the property's unleveraged return based on current income.
mistakes: Using gross income instead of net operating income (NOI)
Not properly calculeting NOI by subtracting all operating expenses
Comparing cap rates across different property types without adjustment
